subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face toward the Self-Subsisting Lord of all contingent beings, on the Day when, through His light, earth and heaven were made resplendent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من توجه الی قیوم الممکنات فی یوم بنوره اشرقت الارض و السموات ورقه مطرزه
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
